description.value:
Beginning at 7th level, with the blood of a ferocious beast in your veins, your tenacity and will is like no other. You gain an amount of Fury die equal to double your proficiency bonus. These die are d6's and you can spend them to use the following effects. At 11th and 15th levels the size of your Fury die increase to a d8 and d10, respectively. You regain half your spent Feral Dice on a short rest, and all on a long rest.

  • Licked Wounds: When you would receive healing you may spend any number of Fury Die, adding them to the total number of hit points healed.

  • Leone's Finesse: When you would make a dexterity or strength saving throw or skill check you may spend two Fury die, adding half the total to the saving throw or skill check roll.

  • Feline Agility: You may spend two Fury die, gaining addtional movement speed equal to 5* the result of the die until the beginning of your next turn.

  • Cat Attack: Whenever you would deal damage to a creature with an taijutsu or unarmed attack you may spend up to two Fury die, adding addtional damage equal to 2* the total of the dice rolled.

  • Big Paw Strike: Whenever you would cast a taijutsu you may spend 3 Fury die, you increase your taijutsu damage die step by one. You can only use this effect once per turn. (d4>d6>d8>d10>d12).
